message:
fix(core): SLO percentile calculation + alerts AccountBalance summary

slo_conformance.rs: Fix p99 percentile calculation that used .ceil()
on (percentile/100 * (n-1)), which for 100 samples gave index 99
(the max) instead of 98 (the 99th percentile). Switch to proper
nearest-rank method: ceil(percentile/100 * n) - 1.

alerts.rs: Add missing deficit percentage to AccountBalance alert
summary. All other alert types (Cost, TokenUsage, RateLimitFrequency)
include the percent_of_threshold value, but AccountBalance omitted it,
making it inconsistent and less informative.

21,287 lib tests pass. No regressions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
